claims.claim_text: The southwest monsoon is expected to reach Kerala on May 26.
claims.evidence_text: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) said on Monday that the southwest monsoon is expected to reach Kerala on May 26 this year.

metrics.name: Rainfall alert
metrics.evidence_text: The IMD defines an “orange alert” as a warning for very heavy rainfall ranging from 11 cm to 20 cm.
